ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during registration */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date user registered on the platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for demographic analysis */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for shipping or communication purposes */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country for geographic analysis */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Student, Instructor, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the course (e.g., Computer Science, Mathematics) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in minutes */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course (if paid) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the course */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of users enrolled in the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the course information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Percentage of the course completed by the user */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the user completed the course */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a certificate has been issued to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the interaction */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, comment, complete) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction (e.g., specific content viewed, comment text) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds (for activities like video watching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., user engagement, course completion) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the report (e.g., specific metrics, data range) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "admin_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the administrative action taken */,
  "affected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_affected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token generated for password reset */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the password reset request */,
  "reset_status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "reset_completion_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
